frame: NAS education-cell lifetime NPV is one ledger layer ℓ — not all-government net. School (cross-section), state/local surge, enforcement (CBP/ICE), immigration courts (EOIR), and episodic shelter are separate ℓ with overlap rules vs NAS state/local already inside cells.

parameter_claims.population: mexico_origin, NAS 2017 individual, baseline_public_goods, no descendants
parameter_claims.notes: NOT net of school_burden, admin, courts, shelter — partial ledger

parameter_claims.population: mexico_origin, per_pupil x school_age_kids/adult microsim weights
parameter_claims.notes: Not netted into lifetime_npv; descendants K-12 not in NAS individual cell
Honest short-horizon object; still excludes courts, ICE, Medicaid beyond school
UNIT MISMATCH — do not subtract from NPV per adult directly

parameter_claims.population: added surge residents, state/local direct costs

parameter_claims.notes: Full-budget allocation overstates marginal cost; fixed overhead not separable in headline
Marginal path for G-LIF-R03; not in NAS NPV
Episodic local ℓ — surge-era, not Mexico-stock lifetime scalar
US-born children fiscal path booked separately in NAS total columns
INFERENCE — enforcement allocation dominates sign swing

generators.name: Full ledger enumeration before NAS scalar
generators.prompt: Before citing any NAS NPV scalar: list {in: federal, state/local in cell, descendants, public goods, enforcement, courts, episodic shelter}. Block net-contributor language until missing ℓ tagged.
generators.retrodiction: Would have blocked +$46k Mexico headline without descendants excluded and ICE/EOIR absent.
generators.negative_space: NAS individual NPV treated as all-government lifetime net

generators.name: NAS cell × school-burden double-count check
generators.prompt: Cross-check NAS individual cell vs school_burden_per_adult for double-count. Individual=no descendants → add current-HH school layer separately.
generators.retrodiction: Would have separated NAS path from $771/yr school before merging.
generators.negative_space: Subtract school on NAS without descendant booking check

generators.name: Enforcement allocation-rule tagger (marginal vs fixed)
generators.prompt: Allocate CBP+ICE via explicit rule: per encounter, per bed-day, per unauthorized stock, or fixed national. Tag fixed vs marginal.
generators.retrodiction: Would have flagged ~$2.1k/yr enforcement missing from lifetime NPV.
generators.negative_space: Full agency budget per average immigrant

generators.name: EOIR case-load × nationality cost join
generators.prompt: Join EOIR case load × nationality to origin cells; $/case for asylum backlog cohorts. Separate from NAS criminal justice.
generators.retrodiction: Would have surfaced staged EOIR with no Mexico rollup.
generators.negative_space: Court costs zero or inside NAS cell

generators.name: Full fiscal-stack vector export (never scalar)
generators.prompt: Export v_full_fiscal_stack: columns per ℓ + overlap matrix. Headline = vector never scalar.
generators.retrodiction: Would have required three-layer + lifetime + admin before Mexico net thesis.

overlap_matrix.lifetime_npv_vs_school_burden: NAS individual excludes descendants → school_burden_per_adult is largely additive, not double-count
overlap_matrix.lifetime_npv_vs_local_flow: local_flow is per_pupil scenario — incompatible unit; use school_burden_per_adult instead
overlap_matrix.lifetime_npv_vs_nas_state_local_inside_c: partial overlap — do not subtract full CBO state/local without bridge
overlap_matrix.enforcement_vs_federal_annual_proxy: SIPP federal proxy excludes detention/ICE — additive
overlap_matrix.eoir_vs_nas: additive — not in education NPV rows

honest_objects.lifetime_partial: lifetime_npv NAS mix = +$45,631/adult — federal/education-cell upper bound
honest_objects.lifetime_stack_target: lifetime_npv | school_npv | state_local_npv | admin | courts | episodic_local
